name: AIIMS Mangalagiri – Senior Residents/Senior Demonstrators – 21 Posts

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 21 Senior Residents/Senior Demonstrators Posts
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Mangalagiri has notified 21 vacancies for Senior Residents/Senior Demonstrators posts for eligible candidates with a M.Sc, MD/MS/DNB, Ph.D and interested candidates can submit online applications on or before 30 May 2026 at the official website of AIIMS Mangalagiri.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Mangalagiri Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: All India Institute of Medical Sciences
